notes: Deployment Labeling — print an asset label for a device straight from the Master, reusing the Tactical Print (BLE) pipeline. New zpl_assetLabel(dev, ctx) mirrors zpl_faultLabel: hostname (large), LOC (cab + U), MODEL/SN, PHANTOM//ts, a Code 128 barcode of the serial — or the hostname/DNS when the serial is blank, so the printed label always re-scans into Metal Match / PhantomScanner — plus a compact PHANTOM-Link QR. New btPrint_openAsset(dev, ctx) opens the existing #bt-print-sheet modal in asset mode (repoints the reused preview rows to LOC / MODEL+SN; btPrint_open resets them to CAUSE/ACTION); btPrint_execute now picks zpl_assetLabel vs zpl_faultLabel by mode; btPrint_close clears asset state. A '▷ PRINT ASSET LABEL' button (pt-btn-secondary, --cyan-bright) is injected into the RACK MAP device sheet (openRmDevice) below the connections; cab context from window._rmConnHit. Missing serials handled (barcode falls back to dev.name/DNS; SN line omitted). MASTER-tab rows intentionally NOT touched. Zero new CSS (reuses .pt-btn + .btp-* classes). Brace heuristic shifts 3121 -> 3131 BALANCED — added JS braces swept into a style region by the counter's regex (same artifact noted at v1.6.80); no CSS rule changed, node --check clean on both inline scripts + sw.js. Built directly in Claude Code on top of v1.6.83 — sync web-Claude's sandbox before the next app handback. Three stamps at v1.6.84.
